Short Description

> Prime Drive is a doorstep car washing service that provides convenient, professional, and eco-friendly vehicle cleaning at customers' homes, offices, and other locations. The company eliminates the need to visit a car wash by delivering high-quality cleaning services directly to the customer's doorstep.



Detailed Business Description

> Prime Drive is a mobile car care and doorstep vehicle washing company focused on providing hassle-free car cleaning services. Customers can book a wash at their preferred location and time, and trained service professionals arrive with the necessary equipment and cleaning materials. The business aims to save customers time while ensuring their vehicles remain clean, well-maintained, and presentable. Prime Drive offers services such as exterior washing, interior cleaning, detailing, polishing, and subscription-based maintenance plans for regular vehicle care.



One-Line Pitch

> "Professional car washing and detailing services delivered directly to your doorstep."



Mission Statement

> "To make vehicle care effortless by providing reliable, high-quality doorstep car washing services that save customers time and deliver exceptional results."

Value Proposition: Saves time by bringing professional car cleaning directly to the customer
